Kurumsal.pageSubtitle: Your trusted and compassionate guide for children's development.
Kurumsal.storyText: Önce Özel Eğitim was founded in Pendik to provide the highest quality, science-based, and loving educational services to children with special needs and their families. Over the years, our growing team of experts has brought hope and strength to thousands of families. Our central goal is to help every child discover their individual potential and participate fully in society.
Kurumsal.missionText: Believing that every child is unique, to improve their quality of life through evidence-based and love-centered approaches; contributing to their becoming independent, confident, and happy individuals.
Kurumsal.visionText: To be the most trusted, innovative, and accessible center in our region in the field of special education and rehabilitation; serving with an institutional approach that makes every family feel supported.
Kurumsal.val1Desc: We always maintain transparent, open, and trust-based communication with our families.
Kurumsal.val2Desc: We approach every child and family with warmth, understanding, and an empathetic heart.
Kurumsal.val3Desc: We apply programs supported by current research and evidence-based methods.
Kurumsal.val4Desc: In every decision, we prioritize the best interest and individual needs of the child.

Egitimlerimiz.pageSubtitle: 11 comprehensive therapy and education programs, science-based and delivered by our expert team.
Egitimlerimiz.ctaBannerTitle: Which program is right for your child?
Egitimlerimiz.ctaBannerDesc: Our experts will guide you with a free initial evaluation.
Egitimlerimiz.prog1desc: Individualized therapy sessions for children experiencing language development delays and communication difficulties.
Egitimlerimiz.prog2desc: A structured, holistic, and family-inclusive support program for children diagnosed with ASD.
Egitimlerimiz.prog3desc: Evidence-based special education and support program for reading, writing, and mathematics difficulties.
Egitimlerimiz.prog4desc: Specially equipped sessions for children with sensory processing difficulties, led by expert physiotherapists.
Egitimlerimiz.prog5desc: A comprehensive therapy program for daily living skills, hand function, and environmental adaptation.
Egitimlerimiz.prog6desc: A systematic intervention method based on positive reinforcement with defined behavioral goals.
Egitimlerimiz.prog7desc: An individualized program developing academic, social, and life skills appropriate to the person's capacity.
Egitimlerimiz.prog8desc: A comprehensive program supporting holistic development with physical support and adapted educational materials.
Egitimlerimiz.prog9desc: An individualized program focusing on strengthening attention skills, self-regulation, and organizational strategies.
Egitimlerimiz.prog10: Play Therapy and Social Skills Groups
Egitimlerimiz.prog10desc: Small group sessions supporting social skills, peer relationships, and emotional expression through play.
Egitimlerimiz.prog11desc: Counseling service strengthening the process through home strategies, psychological support, and guidance.

UzmanKadrosu.teamBannerTitle: A Team Dedicated to Continuous Development
UzmanKadrosu.teamBannerDesc: All our team members hold national and international certifications and continue their professional development through regular supervision, conferences, and training.

FAQ.sectionSubtitle: Find answers to your questions here.
FAQ.q1: Is the initial assessment consultation free?
FAQ.a1: Yes, the initial pre-assessment consultation with our experts is completely free. During this meeting, your child's developmental needs are identified and a personalized roadmap is created.
FAQ.q2: How long does a session last?
FAQ.a2: Our individual therapy and education sessions are 45-50 minutes, and social skills group sessions are 60 minutes.
FAQ.q3: What age groups do you work with?
FAQ.a3: Our center provides comprehensive support services to children and adolescents between the ages of 2-18.
FAQ.q4: What should we do to start education?
FAQ.a4: You can reach us by phone, email, or by filling out the form on our website. Creating an appointment is the first step; our experts will guide you.
FAQ.q5: How can I track my child's progress?
FAQ.a5: Regular progress reports are prepared according to the goals set for each child, and periodic family briefing meetings are organized. We manage the process together.
